title: Glochidion diversifolium
taxonomy: Glochidion diversifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to the Pacific Islands and has been found in various regions including Australia, New Caledonia, and Fiji. The classification of Glochidion diversifolium is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Rosids, order Malpighiales, family Phyllanthaceae, genus Glochidion, species G. diversifolium. This species is part of the large and diverse Phyllanthaceae family, which contains over 2,000 species. Glochidion diversifolium is an example of the complex and varied classification of flowering plants.
